commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: There shall meet you. "Observe the majesty of His Divinity," says S. Ambrose (in Luke 22:8). "He is speaking with His disciples, and yet He knows what is about to happen elsewhere."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Nor will it be incongruous to interpret figuratively the fact that, when the Lord was about to celebrate the last Passover, he told the disciples who were sent to make preparation that they would meet a man bearing water. He thus points out the place for celebrating the Passover by the sign of water.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: That, when the Lord was about to celebrate the last Passover, He said to the disciples who were sent to make preparation, "Ye will meet a man bearing water."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
